decisions.title: Finalize Python Rules GA criteria and launch date
decisions.context: ENG-10740 shows policy round-trip capability maturing. Need to decide GA readiness criteria and coordinate with customer-facing teams for launch.

arguments.for: Python Rules is core to 'Build the Moat' pillar and differentiates Sift. Customer demand is high and feature completeness is tracking well.
arguments.against: Policy parsing edge cases (ENG-10740) and execution alarms (ENG-10454) suggest stability concerns. May need extended beta to capture more signals.

decisions.title: Approve Global Nav IA redesign for Explore V2
decisions.context: DES-156 and DES-158 running UXR with 15 sessions across user types. Nav structure impacts 'Embed Deeper' goal by reducing time-to-insight. Results inform Canvas and Explore integration.

arguments.for: Current nav confusion hurts adoption with new users. Fixing this unblocks faster onboarding and increases decisions captured per session.
arguments.against: Nav changes risk disrupting power users. Need strong signal from research before committing to implementation timeline.

decisions.title: Commit to CSRS rollout timeline and customer migration plan
decisions.context: ENG-10488 (consistent hashing) and ENG-10160 (query forwarding) are foundation for read-path performance. Directly impacts 'Nail the Core' for high-volume customers experiencing latency.

arguments.for: Query performance is top customer complaint. CSRS solves this architecturally and enables larger deployments. Critical for enterprise expansion.
arguments.against: Migration complexity and risk. Need phased rollout strategy and rollback plan. May delay other roadmap items if issues emerge.

decisions.title: Establish Ask SIFT conversation routing and state architecture
decisions.context: ENG-10385 (state machine), ENG-10543 (routing), ENG-10603 (trace analysis) show foundational work. Need decision on multi-turn conversation model and context retention strategy.

arguments.for: Ask SIFT is key to 'Embed Deeper' - enabling non-technical users to capture decisions. Conversation quality directly impacts adoption and North Star metric.
arguments.against: Premature architecture lock-in risks. Should gather more user signals from beta before committing to specific state/routing model.

decisions.title: Define customer co-marketing strategy and ROI metrics
decisions.context: CAGR-7 (Sophia/Kepler), CAGR-37 (Starpath), CAGR-54 (Heart Aerospace) show multiple customer story opportunities. Need framework for selecting partners and measuring impact.

arguments.for: Customer stories are highest-converting content for aerospace/defense buyers. Builds moat through demonstrated proof points and strengthens partner relationships.
arguments.against: Resource intensive and difficult to measure direct pipeline impact. May distract from product-led growth initiatives and self-serve adoption.

decisions.title: Prioritize Canvas vs Explore V2 engineering investment Q3 2026
decisions.context: Feature flags cleanup (ENG-10476), family plot support (ENG-6412), and nav research (DES-156) span both products. Need strategic allocation decision for next quarter.

arguments.for: Canvas drives multi-user collaboration and decision capture (North Star). Should double down on differentiated capability vs iterating mature Explore.
arguments.against: Explore V2 is daily driver for power users. Performance and usability gaps (ENG-10721, ENG-10670) hurt retention. Must nail core before expanding surface area.
